biopipen.utils 0.4.1
  • Reference

Visualize contamination correction results of Seurat object

Source: R/scrna-viz.R
VizSeuratContamination.Rd

Visualize contamination correction results of Seurat object

Usage

VizSeuratContamination(
  object,
  plot_type = c("ridge", "histogram", "bar", "violin", "box", "heatmap", "dot"),
  metric = c("contam", "contamination", "expr", "expression"),
  markers = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

object

A Seurat object with contamination correction results

plot_type

Type of plot to generate

metric

Metric to visualize, one of "contam", "contamination" and "expression". "contam" is an alias of "contamination". For scCDC, only sample-level contamination fraction is available. For decontX, cell-level contamination fraction is available.

markers

List of marker genes to visualize expression of contamination genes. For scCDC, the GCGs will be used by default.

...

Additional arguments to pass to the plot function.
